title: SimpleCrown
description:
Adds a simple, but cool looking crown. 
Not obtainable in Survival.
body:
# SimpleCrown Adds a simple Crown to the Game.
Ever wanted to be a King in Minecraft? **Well now you have a Crown** 👑
The Crown is not obtainable in Survival so either you do ***cheat cheat***.
Or if you are a Modpack Creator ⚙️ make a way for players to get it. 🗺️ #### The Crown can't despawn. ### License: The License is MIT, so do what you want.
